summary: drop-bid-window now falls through pendingDelete → redemption → expiration when computing the bid window.
reason: Code extracted redemption from RDAP events but only computed windows for pendingDelete or expiration; domains in active redemption (30-day grace) returned an error even though redemption+35d was enough to estimate.
validated_outcome: go vet/build clean; redemption-only domains now produce a window with basis 'redemption+35d (estimated; verify with later RDAP refresh)'.
